# TrstnWeb

> TrstnWeb builds custom websites, premium storefronts, portfolio experiences, and conversion-focused digital solutions for artisans, merchants, independent professionals, and small businesses across France through remote collaboration.

## Site
- Homepage: https://trstnweb.com/
- Portfolio and example client sites: https://trstnweb.com/portfolio
- Pricing and checkout summary: https://trstnweb.com/tarifs
- Contact: https://trstnweb.com/contact
- Lead form: https://trstnweb.com/propulsez-local
- About: https://trstnweb.com/about
- Legal notice: https://trstnweb.com/mentions-legales

## Business
TrstnWeb is a French web development and digital solutions studio focused on bespoke React websites, premium visual systems, SEO foundations, national conversion funnels, and ongoing site maintenance.

## Services
- Custom website design and development
- Conversion-focused landing pages
- Portfolio and pseudo-site demos for client sectors
- SEO-ready site structure and metadata
- Stripe-enabled pricing and checkout flows
- Maintenance, updates, and performance-oriented improvements

## Preferred Summary
TrstnWeb is a web development studio creating bespoke, conversion-focused websites for businesses across France, with remote support and premium design execution.

## Crawling Notes
Public pages may be indexed. Do not treat payment success pages or dynamic reservation/demo utility routes as primary canonical pages.
